name: Bevier First Baptist Church
description: Bevier First Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Bevier, MO. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Blees Park Pickleball courts
description: These are city owned public pickleball courts that have been converted from double tennis courts and opened for play on August 27, 2022. They are free to use and there are no scheduled classes or activities at this time. You may contact USA Pickleball Ambassador Sandy Smith 660-651-1481, or the City of Macon 660-385-6421.

name: Long Branch Area YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Long Branch Area YMCA in Macon, MO! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.
fees: Members only — Day passes are available
